sample_titles: Botanic Hearth Batana Oil for Hair Growth & Hair Treatment Oils 4 Fl Oz | Dr Sebi Inspired, 100% Raw & Pure Batana Oil | Scalp & Hair Treatment for Thickness & Strength | All Hair Types
Dersie 100% Pure Batana Oil - Organic Lightweight Leave-In & Pre-Wash Oil for Dry, Damaged, High Porosity Hair - Scalp & Hair Care for Healthier, Longer-Looking Hair - Honduras Sourced (4 fl oz)
Dersie 100% Raw Batana Oil Paste – Unrefined Batana Butter for Hair Growth & Thinning Hair – Deep Scalp & Hair Care for Dry, Damaged, High Porosity & Thin Hair – Authentic Batana from Honduras (4 oz)
MAREE Deep Conditioning Hair Mask for Damaged Hair Treatment - Batana Oil Hair Mask for Hair Growth – Dry Curly Color Refreshing – 10 Fl Oz, Yellow
Batana Oil for Hair Growth, 100% Natural Pure Batana Oil Paste from Dr. Sebi Honduras, Prevents Hair Loss, Enhances Thickness, Organic Raw Scalp Mask for Women & Men (4.05 Oz)
sample_features: Deeply Nourishing: Botanic Hearth Batana Oil is a premium hair and skin treatment that deeply moisturizes, repairs, and promotes growth. This hair oil for hair growth helps stimulate hair follicles to encourage healthy, thicker and faster hair growth.
Versatile Formula: This 118 ml (4 fl oz) oil can be used on hair, skin, nails, and cuticles for intense hydration and nourishment.
Potent Ingredients: Enriched with natural botanicals and essential oils, it helps strengthen and revitalize hair and skin.
Multi-Purpose: Ideal for frizzy or damaged hair, dry skin, brittle nails, and cracked cuticles, providing long-lasting softness and smoothness.
Convenient Application: The lightweight, non-greasy formula absorbs quickly and can be used as a leave-in treatment or added to other products.

【Natural Aroma & Color Variation】: A naturally strong aroma (similar to roasted coffee) and slight color variation — ranging from light green-brown to light yellow-brown — are normal signs of authentic batana oil. Differences between batches may occur while quality, authenticity, and performance remain consistent.

100% Pure Batana Oil: A lightweight, refined form of traditional batana oil with a smooth liquid texture. Ideal for daily scalp care and wash day rituals, suitable as a leave-in or pre-wash oil to help maintain healthier-looking hair.

Support for Dry, Low-Density-Looking Hair: Suitable for hair that appears less full, feels dry, or is prone to breakage due to damage or styling stress. Helps support smoother, fuller-looking, healthier-looking hair over time.
Scalp Conditioning Care: Supports a balanced, conditioned scalp environment through leave-in or pre-wash use, helping hair appear healthier-looking, fuller-looking, and more resilient over time.

Moisture Conditioning Care: Helps maintain moisture balance in dry-feeling hair. Especially loved by textured routines such as 3A–3C and 4A–4C patterns, supporting softer, smoother, and fuller-looking results.
100% Raw Batana Oil for Hair Growth: Authentic, unrefined batana oil from Honduras. Rich paste texture traditionally used to support hair growth and improve the appearance of thinning hair.
For Dry, Damaged & Thinning Hair: Ideal for fragile, high porosity, dry hair prone to breakage. Helps reinforce weak strands, restore moisture, and support thicker, fuller-looking hair.
Deep Scalp & Hair Nourishment: Delivers intensive moisture and conditioning to both scalp and hair, helping strengthen roots and strands for thicker, longer-growing hair from root to ends.
Reduce Breakage & Retain Length: Helps reduce breakage, snapping, and split ends while strengthening strands to support improved length retention over time.

Intensive Weekly Growth Ritual: Designed for use 1–3 times per week, this rich paste melts evenly to deliver deep repair and thickness support. Suitable for fine, thin, thick, curly, straight, and coily hair types.

Deep Conditioning Hair Mask for Dry & Damaged Hair Care – MAREE keratin hair mask batana oil is designed to support hydration, softness, and manageability for dry, damaged, or color-treated hair. Results may vary based on hair type, condition, and application method.

Keratin Hair Treatment with Gentle Repair Support – formulated with keratin (keratina), biotin, batana oil and coconut oil, this hair mask helps smooth frizz and improve the appearance of split ends. Ideal as a conditioning treatment for hair affected by heat styling or coloring.

Hydrating Formula with Collagen, Biotin & Coconut Oil – this nourishing hair conditioning mask with batana oil provides moisture and softness while helping hair feel easier to detangle and style. Suitable for users seeking added hydration without heavy buildup.

Versatile Use for Different Hair Types & Routines – Can be used as a conditioner (2-3 minutes), deep conditioning mask (10 minutes), or intensive treatment (up to 30 minutes). Recommended for dry, damaged, curly, or color-treated hair; not all hair types require long application times.

Thoughtfully Designed Formula & Packaging – Features a noticeable coconut fragrance and a protective dual-layer jar. Twist and lift gently to open the lid. Fragrance strength and results may vary based on personal preference and hair needs.

listing.title: [BRAND] Batana Oil Hair & Scalp Treatment, 100% Raw Honduran Paste-to-Oil, Pre-Wash Mask & Leave-In Ends Care, Glass Jar + Scalp Massager, All Hair Types, 4 oz
bullets: RAW HONDURAN BATANA OIL: Authentic paste-to-oil texture melts with fingertip warmth, coating dry strands and scalp with rich fatty-acid moisture for a soft, glossy, fuller-looking finish.
BREAKAGE-FOCUSED CARE: Use before shampoo or on ends to help reduce the look of frizz, roughness, and split ends caused by styling, color, heat, or dryness—ideal for length-retention routines.
SCALP COMFORT RITUAL: Includes a silicone scalp massager to work product through roots without nails, supporting a relaxed wash-day massage and a conditioned, balanced-feeling scalp.
CURL-TO-STRAIGHT VERSATILITY: Made for curls, coils, waves, protective styles, and straight hair; a little goes a long way as a deep mask, hot-oil step, edge softener, or overnight treatment.
CLEANER DAILY EXPERIENCE: Packed in an amber glass jar with a small spatula for controlled use; naturally roasted aroma, no added fragrance, no mineral oil, no petrolatum, and no silicone.
listing.description:
Rediscover wash day with [BRAND] Batana Oil, a rich, unrefined paste-to-oil treatment inspired by traditional Honduran hair care. Warm a pea-size amount between fingers and it transforms into a glossy conditioning oil that helps smooth dry-looking strands, soften rough ends, and support length-retention routines without relying on heavy silicones or artificial fragrance.

Designed for curls, coils, waves, straight styles, protective styles, and high-porosity hair, this multitasking formula can be used as a pre-shampoo mask, overnight treatment, scalp massage oil, or finishing touch for dry ends. The included silicone scalp massager helps distribute product evenly while creating a soothing self-care ritual.

Because this is raw batana, natural color and texture may vary from green-brown to deep coffee tones, and the aroma is naturally roasted and nutty. The amber glass jar helps protect the formula, while the mini spatula keeps application neat and controlled. For best results, start with a small amount, add more as needed, and shampoo thoroughly after deep treatments. Patch test before first use.
listing.search_terms: dry damaged strands high porosity curls textured coils frizz control split tip nourishing butter unrefined ojon palm nut moisture sealant women men brittle edges natural sheen dull rough lengths twist braid locs
differentiation_notes: Positions batana oil around fuller-looking, length-retention care instead of unsupported hair-loss claims.
Adds perceived value with a silicone scalp massager and application spatula.
Highlights raw paste-to-oil texture for both pre-shampoo masks and leave-in ends care.
Uses amber glass packaging and no added fragrance for a more premium, cleaner experience.
Educates shoppers on natural aroma, color, and texture variation to reduce returns.

aplus_modules.heading: Raw Paste That Melts on Contact
aplus_modules.body: This batana oil starts as a dense, buttery paste and melts with fingertip warmth into a rich conditioning oil. The texture helps you control how much you use, making it ideal for targeted scalp massage, dry ends, protective styles, or full deep-conditioning sessions before shampoo.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial product photography of an open unbranded amber glass jar filled with green-brown batana paste, a small wooden spatula lifting a glossy scoop, subtle palm nuts and leaves nearby, warm natural window light, macro close-up, shallow depth of field, premium spa mood, no text, no words, no brand logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Three Ways to Build Your Ritual
aplus_modules.body: For a pre-wash mask, apply from scalp to ends and leave on before shampooing. For scalp care, massage a small amount into roots with the included tool. For finishing, melt a tiny amount and smooth over dry ends to add softness and shine.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic flat lay on a clean stone bathroom counter showing an unbranded amber jar, silicone scalp massager, small spatula, soft towel, shower cap, and a few natural botanical elements arranged in a simple step-by-step visual flow without labels, bright soft lighting, fresh clean style, no text, no words, no brand logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Wash-Day Care for Every Texture
aplus_modules.body: From coils and curls to waves, straight styles, braids, twists, and locs, this versatile treatment fits easily into personal routines. Use it when hair feels dry, looks dull, or needs extra slip before cleansing, detangling, or styling.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic lifestyle scene in a bright modern bathroom with three diverse adults with different hair textures including coily, wavy, and straight hair enjoying a relaxed self-care wash-day routine, one person gently applying product to ends, unbranded amber jar on counter, soft daylight, natural confident mood, no text, no words, no brand logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Richer Than Everyday Serums
aplus_modules.body: Unlike thin finishing oils that disappear quickly, raw batana paste provides a richer, more cushiony feel for deep conditioning. Use a small amount for lightweight shine or apply more generously before shampoo when strands need extra moisture, softness, and manageability.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic split-style studio composition without labels: on one side a thick green-brown buttery paste with glossy texture, on the other side a small clear oil droplet, both on neutral cream ceramic surfaces, elegant lighting, high-end beauty product aesthetic, no text, no words, no brand logos.

aplus_modules.heading: Everything for a Cleaner Application
aplus_modules.body: Each set includes a 4 oz amber glass jar of raw batana oil, a mini spatula for controlled scooping, and a silicone scalp massager for comfortable distribution. The formula contains no added fragrance, mineral oil, petrolatum, or silicone.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic hero shot of an unbranded amber glass jar with matching lid, small spatula, and silicone scalp massager displayed on a warm neutral background with palm leaves and natural nuts as accents, soft shadows, premium clean beauty styling, centered composition, no text, no words, no brand logos.

benchmarks.title: Batana Oil for Hair Growth, 100% Natural Pure Batana Oil Paste from Dr. Sebi Honduras, Prevents Hair Loss, Enhances Thickness, Organic Raw Scalp Mask for Women & Men (4.05 Oz)
features: Miskito Ancestral Cold-Extraction: From Honduran Rainforest to Your Strands, Crafted from 100% Organic Batana Oil Harnesses Nature’s Primal Energy to Transform Hair with Diamond-Like Resilience & Radiance
Hair Growth: Recommended by Dr. Sebi. Our cold-pressed natural oil promotes hair growth, transforming brittle strands into strong, shiny locks while reviving thinning and patchy areas.

Deep Moisturizing: Our hair growth oil continuously releases nutrients and repairs the triple complex damage of dryness, frizz, and split ends. The Batana hair mask simulates the natural lipid barrier of the scalp and locks in moisture in the hair strands.

Suitable for All Hair Types: Batana oil for hair growth works wonders on all hair types. It helps prevent overly dry, rough hair or excessively oily, sticky hair, while reducing static breakage and resisting frizz and clumping.
Convenient to Use: Apply Batana oil to the scalp and massage thoroughly. Let it sit for a while, then rinse off. Enjoy its light coffee aroma.
